title: erigeron polycladus
intro: Erigeron polycladus, also known as the mountain fleabane or devil's darning needle, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron polycladus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
